data.title: Add suggestion-recording guidance to using-lockpick SKILL.md
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Context
Implement story 1b78-8e0c: update using-lockpick guidance to instruct agents to record suggestions.

Read the full story context: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 1b78-8e0c

## Summary
Add an advisory section to plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md instructing agents to call .claude/scripts/dso suggestion-record.sh when encountering repeated friction, unclear instructions, or workarounds. Framing must be advisory (not a hard gate).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Guidance section exists in plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q 'suggestion\|friction' plugins/dso/skills/using-lockpick/SKILL.md
- [ ] Framing is advisory (contains 'consider' or 'when encountering', not 'must' or 'required')
- [ ] Correct shim path (.claude/scripts/dso suggestion-record.sh) is referenced
